mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_order (order_no, user_id, train_id, seat_count, total_price, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{trainId}, #{seatCount}, #{totalPrice}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT o.*, t.train_no, t.departure, t.destination, t.departure_time FROM ticket_order o LEFT JOIN train t ON o.train_id = t.id WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo}
SELECT o.*, t.train_no, t.departure, t.destination, t.departure_time FROM ticket_order o LEFT JOIN train t ON o.train_id = t.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
SELECT o.*, t.train_no, t.departure, t.destination, t.departure_time FROM ticket_order o LEFT JOIN train t ON o.train_id = t.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM ticket_order WHERE train_id = #{trainId} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket_order WHERE train_id = #{trainId} AND status = #{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_order SET status = 2, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND status = 1
